articles.title: THROUGHPUT WITH CRUSOE CLOUD
articles.summary: AI workloads don't simply need scale, they need ultra-low latency at high throughput. Crusoe [4]'s distributed memory architecture behaves like it's local, even at peak demand. The result?

articles.title: Explore Crusoe Managed Inference
GPT 5.5
articles.summary: OpenAI released GPT-5.5 with improved agentic reasoning, tool use, and efficiency, matching prior latency while increasing performance across coding and knowledge tasks.

articles.title: DEEPSEEK UNVEILS FLAGSHIP AI MODEL A YEAR AFTER BREAKTHROUGH
articles.summary: DeepSeek has rolled out new preview versions of its new flagship AI model. The V4 Flash and V4 Pro series comes with architecture upgrades and optimization improvements. It has a 1-million-token context window. While the service capacity for the V4 Pro series is extremely limited due to a computing crunch, DeepSeek expects pricing for the model to drop once Huawei releases its Ascend 950-powered computing clusters.

articles.title: TENCENT, ALIBABA TO BACK DEEPSEEK AT $20B+ VALUATION
articles.summary: DeepSeek is in talks for its first funding round at a $20 billion valuation, with Tencent and Alibaba interested. Tencent is seeking a 20% stake, but DeepSeek doesn't want to lose that much control. The valuation surged from $10 billion to $20 billion in days, illustrating significant investor interest.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC JUST OVERTOOK OPENAI WITH $1 TRILLION VALUATION
articles.summary: Anthropic reached a $1 trillion valuation on Forge Global, surpassing OpenAI's $880 billion. The spike in Anthropic's value stems from scarce available shares and growing demand due to partnerships and increased use of its Claude Code tool. Current investor interest highlights Anthropic's position as a leading AI opportunity.

articles.title: TRAINING FOR ACCURACY IN SEARCH LLMS
articles.summary: Perplexity detailed a staged post-training approach that teaches models tool use, evidence gathering, and structured evaluation to improve accuracy in search-based AI systems.

articles.title: AGENTICS: AI ENABLEMENT REQUIRES MANAGED AGENT RUNTIMES
articles.summary: Enterprises need managed agent runtimes for effective AI integration, avoiding the complexities of manual configuration. Current solutions like Claude Code are unintuitive, leading to inefficient setups and potential security risks. Companies like Ramp and Stripe have developed custom solutions, but managed services are scarce, creating opportunities for new entrants in the market.

articles.title: THE SEARCH ENGINE BEHIND CURSOR, NOTION, AND LINEAR
articles.summary: turbopuffer is the search engine that Cursor, Notion, and Linear use to retrieve every byte of context without blowing out margins. It's built natively on object storage with smart caching, so it's as fast (p90 < 20ms) as in-memory search, but way cheaper.

articles.title: Read how Cursor cut costs 20x and improved agent reasoning
AN UPDATE ON RECENT CLAUDE CODE QUALITY REPORTS
OPENAI PRIVACY FILTER MODEL
articles.summary: OpenAI released a lightweight open-weight model for detecting and redacting PII in text, designed for fast, local, context-aware privacy filtering workflows.

articles.title: EXPERT UPCYCLING
articles.summary: Amazon researchers released a method to expand Mixture-of-Experts models mid-training by duplicating and specializing experts, improving performance without increasing inference cost.

articles.title: AI CODING FIRM COGNITION IN FUNDING TALKS AT $25 BILLION VALUE
articles.summary: Cognition AI is in early talks to raise a round of funding that would more than double its valuation to $25 billion. The talks are ongoing and the terms could change. Cognition uses AI to streamline the process of writing and debugging code, with a focus on selling to businesses. Its flagship product, Devin, is being used by companies like Anduril and Microsoft.

articles.title: ORACLE'S DELUGE OF AI DEBT PUSHES WALL STREET TO THE LIMIT
articles.summary: Oracle's $300 billion megadeal with OpenAI is testing the limit of Wall Street's appetite for debt tied to the datacenter boom. Banks have struggled for months to spread the risk of the billions of dollars in loans they made to build data centers leased to Oracle in Texas and Wisconsin. Bank balance sheets are now clogged, constraining the financing prospects of future projects tied to Oracle and OpenAI. Silicon Valley needs access to debt to meet its goals for AI-related spending, but so far, Wall Street is largely giving a blank check for the AI ambitions of the most creditworthy tech companies.

articles.title: AGENTS CAN'T CHOOSE BETWEEN STRUCTURE AND FLEXIBILITY
articles.summary: Deciding between Python and Markdown for agent specification involves balancing structure with flexibility. Code-maximalism enforces reliability but lacks adaptability, while Markdown-maximalism allows for creativity but risks errors. Successful agent architectures use a hybrid approach, leveraging Markdown for intent and code for structure to combine flexibility with reliable execution.

articles.title: THE AGENT HARNESS IS A SHELL.
articles.summary: We've cheated by giving agents one powerful tool from 1979 and called it a day. Bash, MCP, and skills we got the whole stack wrong.

articles.title: Here's why.
AI SUMMARIES IN GMAIL
articles.summary: Google added AI Overviews to Gmail for Workspace users, enabling natural language queries that return summarized answers across emails without opening threads.

articles.title: MICROSOFT TO INVEST $1.8B IN AUSTRALIA TO EXPAND AI, CLOUD, AND DIGITAL INFRASTRUCTURE
articles.summary: Microsoft is investing $1.8 billion to significantly expand its cloud computing and artificial intelligence infrastructure across Australia.

articles.title: BECOME A CURATOR FOR TLDR AI (3-5 HRS/WEEK, FULLY REMOTE)
articles.summary: We're looking for an engineer/researcher at a major AI lab or startup to help write for 1M+ subscribers. Curators have been invited to Google I/O and OpenAI DevDay, scouted for Tier 1 VCs, and get early access to unreleased TLDR products. Learn more [23].

articles.title: WHITE HOUSE ACCUSES CHINA OF INDUSTRIAL-SCALE AI MODEL DISTILLATION, COMMITS TO INTELLIGENCE SHARING WITH OPENAI, ANTHROPIC, GOOGLE
articles.summary: Model distillation is a technique that can be used to train cheaper models that approximate the original's capabilities at a fraction of the cost.

articles.title: OLMOEARTH EMBEDDINGS EXPORT
articles.summary: AI2 introduced embedding exports in OlmoEarth Studio, allowing users to generate and share compact Earth observation representations for downstream tasks like search and segmentation.
